title: Add priority left-border and approval/stale visual states to task cards on the board
acceptance_criteria: Task cards with priority='critical' have a 3px left border in #dc2626 (red-600)
Task cards with priority='high' have a 3px left border in #d97706 (amber-600)
Task cards with priority='medium' have no accent left border (default)
Task cards with priority='low' have opacity 0.8 applied
Task cards where isStale=true show a 'Stale' badge (red background) AND a red left border, distinct from approval state
Task cards where approvalState.status='pending' show an amber left border and an 'Approval pending' badge in addition to the existing status badge
The board page at /boards/board-demo visually distinguishes task-001 (in-progress, stale) from task-003 (waiting-approval, review column)
completion_summary: Added priority, stale, and approval-pending visual states to board task cards while preserving click-through behavior and existing metadata.
